content.query:
SELECT
    LocationID,
    COUNT(1) AS number_of_records
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'raw/taxi_zone.csv',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
    )
WITH (
    LocationID SMALLINT,
    Borough VARCHAR(15),
    Zone VARCHAR(50),
    service_zone VARCHAR(15)
) AS taxi_zone
GROUP BY LocationID
HAVING COUNT(1) > 1
